title: pleurosorus pozoi
intro: Pleurosorus pozoi, also known as the "Polypody fern", is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pleurosorus pozoi include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant is commonly prepared as a topical application, such as a salve or ointment, and can also be consumed as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
